title: M03 Mastery Check — Collections & Iteration
description: Quick applied check. No looking things up. Answer from memory.

questions.prompt: Write a one-liner: given an array of products, return the total price of all products where inStock is true.
for...in is safe to use on arrays.
questions.explanation: for...in iterates over property names as strings ('0', '1', '2') and may also iterate inherited properties. Use for...of for arrays.

questions.prompt: What method creates a proper deep clone of a nested object in modern JavaScript?
How do you remove a specific key from an object without mutating it?
questions.answer_key: const { keyToRemove, ...rest } = original; — rest is a new object without that key.
